meaning: adj.使烦恼的,难堪的,使焦躁的
examples: It was galling to have to apologize to a man she hated.
If recoverable oil is found, it will be doubly galling for Argentina.
More galling for other foreign lenders is what they see as China's free-riding.
At specific schools that reported dramatically improved graduation rates, the discrepancy is more galling.
Even more galling, the corporate marketing and products department charged each state for its services.
